---
title: "test_edda_audit_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_edda_audit_empire.py"
loc: 27
complexity: 1
logic_score: 6.67
style_score: 3.77
intel_score: 4.36
overall_score: 4.13
---

## Intent
The `test_edda_audit_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestEddaWarden, warden, test_scan_finds_missing_docstring_function, test_scan_finds_missing_docstring_class, test_scan_ignores_existing_docstring. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestEddaWarden, warden, test_scan_finds_missing_docstring_function, test_scan_finds_missing_docstring_class, test_scan_ignores_existing_docstring. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.edda](file://src.sentinel.wardens.edda)

### Exports
- `TestEddaWarden`
- `warden`
- `test_scan_finds_missing_docstring_function`
- `test_scan_finds_missing_docstring_class`
- `test_scan_ignores_existing_docstring`
